subgraphs.name: Image Edit (Bernini-R)

widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
You can find the original settings here: https://github.com/bytedance/Bernini/blob/main/gradio_demo.py

subgraphs.description: Edits a single image using a text prompt, leveraging Bernini-R's latent semantic planning for changes like object addition, removal, or style transfer. Ideal for creative edits requiring precise semantic understanding, such as adding a snowman to a scene or altering an object's appearance.

subgraphs.name: Select Per-Line Text by Index
subgraphs.description: Selects one line from multiline text by zero-based index for batch or list-driven prompt workflows.

widgets_values:

You are a helpful assistant specialized in text-to-video generation.
You are a helpful assistant specialized in image editing.
You are a helpful assistant specialized in subject-to-image generation.
